---
title: "stage 2 peer review"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

Nobel <- read_csv("Nobel_final_Data.csv")
```

```{r}
ggplot(Nobel, aes(x = Prize_year)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Nobel Laureates Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Count")
```

```{r}
ggplot(Nobel, aes(x = Gender)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Laureates by Gender",
    x = "Gender",
    y = "Count")
```


```{r}
ggplot(Nobel, aes(x = Category, fill = Gender)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of Gender by Category",
    x = "Category",
    y = "Proportion")
```

```{r}
ggplot(Nobel, aes(x = Gender, y = Amount)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Prize Amount Distribution by Gender",
    x = "Gender",
    y = "Prize Amount")
```
